https://wiki.libsdl.org/SDL3/README-linux

sudo apt-get install build-essential git make \
pkg-config cmake ninja-build gnome-desktop-testing libasound2-dev libpulse-dev \
libaudio-dev libfribidi-dev libjack-dev libsndio-dev libx11-dev libxext-dev \
libxrandr-dev libxcursor-dev libxfixes-dev libxi-dev libxss-dev libxtst-dev \
libxkbcommon-dev libdrm-dev libgbm-dev libgl1-mesa-dev libgles2-mesa-dev \
libegl1-mesa-dev libdbus-1-dev libibus-1.0-dev libudev-dev libthai-dev


=====
(y)
sudo apt install libx11-dev libxext-dev libxrandr-dev 
sudo apt install libxcursor-dev libxfixes-dev libxi-dev libxss-dev 
sudo apt install libxtst-dev libxkbcommon-dev 

sudo apt install libegl-dev libegl1-mesa-dev 
sudo apt install libgles2-mesa-dev 
sudo apt install libgl1-mesa-dev 
sudo apt install libdrm-dev libgbm-dev 

(x)
sudo apt-get install gnome-desktop-testing libasound2-dev libpulse-dev
sudo apt-get install libaudio-dev libfribidi-dev libjack-dev libsndio-dev 
sudo apt-get install libdbus-1-dev libibus-1.0-dev libudev-dev libthai-dev

===
sudo apt install gcc g++ gedit git lftp make

sudo apt install libx11-dev libxext-dev libxrandr-dev libxcursor-dev libxfixes-dev libxi-dev libxss-dev libxkbcommon-dev
sudo apt install libegl-dev libegl1-mesa-dev libgles2-mesa-dev libgl1-mesa-dev libdrm-dev libgbm-dev 
sudo apt install libasound2-dev
